text.p: At long last you can read from me. Sorry for the delay. I have been so busy in the recent times trying to tie some loose ends in my life as an academic. I guess I told you I would soon be starting my sabbatical leave. I guess I ll have more time then to contact you. How's your family. I know one day our paths will cross and I hope that will be soon. Please don't forget to send number as you promised. I long to speak to him. I will try and contact today. Thanks.

How are you now? Mr , told me about what happened to you at your base in . You know I never knew that you have moved place. wonder also if you wer aware that was not in for the last academic year. I was on sabbatical leave at , University, one of the new but fastest growing private universities in the country. I am just back and I ve been wondering how I would get your e-mail which I have forgotten before I received this mail.

So how ar you coping now? You know we heard this news and never knew some people we know were involved. What is the situation of things now? Is the government doing anything to rehabilitate those of you affected? Please let us know the details of how things are with you over there. , and I told the HOD about it.

E ku ijo meta. Nice to read your mail How are you doing in ? Thanks for your prayer on the project. I receive your pastoral prayers with excitement. How is your family? How is your work going? I believe you are making some progress. I hope to call you on your number one of these days. Please what is the US code that I will add before the number?
Hope to hear from you soon. I wish you all the best.

Thanks for your mail. The paper you referred to in your mail had been published since last year. Unfortunately, I have not set my eyes on the journal. I have written a couple of mails to the editor to send me my copies of the paper and up till now, I have not received any copy. i only saw it advertised on the Web. So, I do not have the published version of my article, neither do I of others . However, if you want the last version of the paper sent to them before the publication, i could send that to you. the only problem you would have with that is that you cannot cite any page. Please let me know if I should send that and I will surely do so. I will also check if I can send you some other papers on . i will do this as soon as I receive your response. My regards to your family.
